title: Der Mann, der nach der Oma kam
original_title: Der Mann, der nach der Oma kam
overview: Günter and Gudrun Piesold are very busy with their careers as a TV comedian and an actress, so Grandma takes care of household chores and childcare. But when Grandma remarries, the Piesolds are faced with chaos at home and a burning question: Who will take care of the household?
